'''zachulu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:graduette|graduette]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-ch-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:graduette|graduette]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zachulu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæchilith|zæchilith]] || [[word:zæchilij|zæchilij]] || [[word:zæchilish|zæchilish]] || [[word:zæchili|zæchili]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zachuchuluth|zachuchuluth]] || [[word:zachuchuluj|zachuchuluj]] || [[word:zachuchulush|zachuchulush]] || [[word:zachuchulu|zachuchulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zachuluth|zachuluth]] || [[word:zachuluj|zachuluj]] || [[word:zachulush|zachulush]] || [[word:zachulu|zachulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zachufluth|zachufluth]] || [[word:zachufluj|zachufluj]] || [[word:zachuflush|zachuflush]] || [[word:zachufluf|zachufluf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zachuluthu|zachuluthu]] || [[word:zachuluju|zachuluju]] || [[word:zachulushu|zachulushu]] || [[word:zachuluku|zachuluku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zachuluth|zachuluth]] || [[word:zachuluj|zachuluj]] || [[word:zachulush|zachulush]] || [[word:zachulu|zachulu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zachuluthul|zachuluthul]] || [[word:zachulujul|zachulujul]] || [[word:zachulushul|zachulushul]] || [[word:zachulukul|zachulukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zachuluthuthu|zachuluthuthu]] || [[word:zachulujuju|zachulujuju]] || [[word:zachulushushu|zachulushushu]] || [[word:zachuluku|zachuluku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zachuluthun|zachuluthun]] || [[word:zachulujun|zachulujun]] || [[word:zachulushun|zachulushun]] || [[word:zachulukun|zachulukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zachuluthuoro|zachuluthuoro]] || [[word:zachulujuoro|zachulujuoro]] || [[word:zachulushuoro|zachulushuoro]] || [[word:zachulukuoro|zachulukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
